word: G2405 - ἱερατεία - hierateía - hee-er-at-i'-ah - Office of the priesthood

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἱερατεία

- Transliteration: Hierateia

- Phonetic: hee-er-at-i'-ah

- Definition:

1. the priesthood, the office of a priest

- Origin: from G2407

- TDNT entry: 07:11,3

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G2407; priestliness that is the sacerdotal function: - office of the priesthood priest´ s office.
